title: Culturally specificity while remaining universally relatable
content:
Culturally specificity while remaining universally relatable
Equal opportunity education regardless of race, religious or cultural backgrounds
Diverse canon
Action able diversity
Diversity of thought
Giving the voices
Being in diverse environments makes me most comfortable
Start with why I love diversity

Diversity is very important to me.

Staten Island is mono cultured hub in a multicultural epicenter
Grad school; super diverse latinx population, diverse set of thought

Feedback session, new perspective on word, negative historical context for woman

Having a diverse way to tackle and explore ideas and problems is going to bring all different types of tho king to tackling a challenge. It would be a tragedy if one cloned perspective tackled an issue opposed to multiple background and mindsets tackling the same information.

Bring diversity in the classroom, Race, gender, sexual preference, ability (using platforms to assist multiple abilities)
